productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex Purple Flip Flops
description: Style Note Happy little feet in colour pop brights - this pair of sandals from warner bros knows how to capture your little one's heart and keep his feet comfy. Fun cartoon characters on bright sandals which have cut-outs to keep the twinkle toes airy - grab a pair with your little one's favourite cartoon on it! Product Details Purple flip flops with thong straps Footbed with Tom and Jerry cartoon print on it Soft rubber outsole with patterns on it Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight
